summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of CAVI crypto investment platform. All 38 backend pytest tests pass (auth, wallets, ROI deposit-only correctness, withdrawals, admin endpoints, role protection, prices). End-to-end UI flows verified: landing → signup → dashboard → wallet generation (one-time address reveal) → deposit recording → ROI page → withdrawal request → admin panel (login, dashboard stats, users with toggles, ROI control with run-cycle and global pause, withdrawals approve/reject, admin access set-role, settings, audit log). ROI math validated: $1000 deposit base produced ~$9.20 ROI (0.92%), $1500 → $12.36 (0.824%), $1000 → $11.94 (1.194%) — all within hidden rate tiers and deposit-only (never compounds).
action_items: Minor: documented testid 'admin-tab-deposits' returned 0 — the sidebar 'Deposits & Wallets' tab exists visually but its data-testid appears to differ (e.g. 'admin-tab-deposits-wallets' or similar). Verify and align with docs so view-key UI flow is automation-friendly.

Consider rate-limiting /api/auth/login to prevent brute-force (no lockout was observed after multiple wrong-password attempts; CORS allow_credentials=False so no httpOnly cookie flow, which is fine for JWT-in-localStorage design).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses load_dotenv at module top (correct). bcrypt hashes generated via bcrypt.gensalt() (proper $2b$ format).
seed_admin is idempotent and updates the password if the env value changed — good.
MongoDB _id properly excluded from all responses via {'_id': 0} projections and public_user() helper.
ROI logic correctly uses depositBase (never compounds): amount = depositBase * rate / 100. Verified via UI ($1000 * 0.92% = $9.20).
Idempotency: existing ROI row check (userId, cycleDate) prevents duplicates per day.
Private key flow is secure: AES-GCM encrypted at /api/wallets, never returned in user-facing endpoints, decrypt only via /api/admin/wallets/{keyId}/key with audit log + 403 for non-admins.
in_penalty_window() uses PKT hour==5 (05:00-06:00 PKT == 00:00-01:00 UTC) — matches spec.
Minor: PATCH /admin/users/role uses require_superadmin (correct); other PATCH /admin/users/{id}/roi and /wd allow regular admins (also correct).
server.py is 676 lines — within the 700-line guideline but approaching the limit; consider splitting into routers/auth.py, routers/admin.py, routers/wallets.py for maintainability.
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' from env which is permissive; acceptable for demo but restrict in production.
test_credentials: superadmin@cavi.io / Cavi@Admin2025 (verified working). Test users created via signup with TEST_/e2e_ prefix.
seed_data_creation: Created several test users via /api/auth/register with TEST_ prefix during pytest run. They remain in DB; cleanup not performed (not required for read-only re-runs).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_cavi_backend.py covers 38 cases; run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. Tests are idempotent (use uuid suffixes). Web3 wallet login intentionally skipped (requires real wallet extension). Admin 'Deposits & Wallets' tab testid mismatches docs — confirm actual testid via DOM inspection before writing automation around view-key buttons.
rca of the issue: No issues found — all features working as specified.
